name: HR payroll teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR payroll teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month, manual data extraction causes compliance issues. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
target_audience: HR payroll teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Manual extraction of payroll data leads to compliance issues.
